stemHtml: When a generator is running, the indication on the centre-zero ammeter shows (1) _____ and the batterry voltage shows (2) _____.

options.a: (1) Positive current; (2) a lower voltage than battery nominal voltage.
options.b: (1) Positive current; (2) a higher voltage than battery nominal voltage.
options.c: (1) Negative current; (2) a higher voltage than battery nominal voltage.
options.d: (1) Negative current; (2) a lower voltage than battery nominal voltage.
